title: McFish Pack
description: Enjoy minecraft Create with the best addons and decor mods, as well as ComputerCraft and more QoL changes.
body:
# McFish Pack 🐟🍔

Enjoy minecraft Create with the best addons and decor mods, as well as ComputerCraft and more QOL changes like way stones, graves and a storage system and many mods to make your game look beautiful.

Don't get overwhelmed from too many mods that all add huge complexity to your game. Just enjoy vanilla minecraft, maybe explore some mods like Create or just use the new decorative blocks to get creative.

## What is in the modpack?

- ⚙️ **Create:** explore Create and many addons, so it doesn't get boring
  - Trains, Storage, Jetpack, Deco, Ore Excavation and more
- 💾 **Tom's Simple Storage:** a simple mod to use a storage system
- 💻 **Computer Craft:** for all the nerds out there (not in 2.0)
- 🗼 **Waystone:** a new way to quickly get from point A to B
- 🌾 **Farmer's Delight & Let's do Vinery:** new recipes, food, and crops
- 💺 **Decoration:** some mod that add decor and many new building blocks
- 🔎 **REI:** makes it easy to find and explore all recipes 
- 🏠 **YUNG:** many new and reworked structures to explore 
- 🌄 **Terralith:** more beautiful terrain generation for your world
- 🎴 **Graphic:** mods and resource packs that make your minecraft look beautiful
  - many 3D blocks (liek ladder), better enchantment books, shaders...
- ⚡ **Optimization:** many mods to optimize your experience  
- 👪 **Essential Mod:** easily play with friends without a server

## Additional information

On the first start, make sure to activate all available resource packs.

> If you want to play with **Distant Horizons** you have to download [this](https://modrinth.com/mod/distanthorizons/version/2.1.0-a-1.20.1) version and add it manually to your mods folder.

> If you want to **play with friends** and don't have server use [this](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential/versions?g=1.20.1&l=fabric) mod. It makes it possible to open a server on your local computer and invite friends to your world.

## How to install
Install on [Modrinth App](https://modrinth.com/app) 

or

1. Download and install [Prism Launcher]([https://prismlauncher.org/download/windows/](https://prismlauncher.org/download/windows/))
2. Login with your Microsoft account
2. Create a new instance ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/36203f5f4d45183e0550de3ab768338ef4854082.png)
3. Go to Modrinth and search for "Mc Fish" ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9a3c5337f84bce4f5e017bbcc1eb203d8b0c5727.png)
3. Now you can install and run the modpack

<details>
<summary>Troubleshoot </summary>

- Sometimes you may have a problem with your java version. If this happens, you can change your current version in the instance settings ![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/68747f89a348a220d51b91dcf016348c6ac2d21d.png)

</details>
